title: Cozy Peppery Light Jersey Royal Potatoes Stir-fry
description: A light and cozy German dish featuring Jersey Royal potatoes that are caramelized with a peppery kick in this egg-free-friendly recipe.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Halve the potatoes lengthwise and rub with oil.
Roast in preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
While potatoes are roasting, heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add finely chopped red peppers and yellow onion. Sauté until softened, approximately 4-5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and crushed pepper corns. Stir well for about 30 seconds to release flavors.
Stir in roasted potatoes from the oven. Cook together for another minute until potatoes are coated with spices.
If using, sprinkle sesame seeds over the top before serving as a garnish.
